title: Lost Ark Brelshaza Gate 6 Clear
FFXIV The Epic of Alexander (Ultimate) Clear
Top 10 Hardest Raid Bosses of All Time in World of Warcraft [Reforged]
description:
In this video I'll go over the hardest raid bosses in the history of warcraft, based on a lot of different factors that I'll be explaining within each segment of this video.

--The List--
Intro: (0:00)
10-Fallen Avatar, Tomb of Sargeras - (453 wipes before World First  (Method)): (0:11)
9-  Blackhand (WoD) (325 wipes before World First (Method): (4:07)
8- WoD Archimonde (472 wipes before World First (Method)): (7:04)
7-Firelands Ragnaros (500+ (Paragon): (10:32)
6- Uu'nat, BfA- (731 wipes before World First (Pieces)): (13:23)  
5- The Lich King, Wotlk (170+ (Paragon) (limited attempts, 5% buff)): (17:26)
4- Legion Kil'Jaeden (654 wipes before World First (Method): (21:31)
3- Alone in the Dark (Yogg-Saron) Wotlk (500+ estimated (Stars) World First): (28:43) 
2- C'thun, Vanilla WoW (Killed 86 days after it was available): (36:05) 
1- M'uru, TBC (Only 5 guilds killed it pre-nerf): (41:33)

title: How MMO Players Killed an Unkillable Boss
description:
One of the most infamous moments in MMO history has to be the death of the Sleeper on Rallos Zek. A boss that was never designed to be killed as it was a story event. Upon awakening, the sleeper would leave and death touch players in different zones.

But on the final server where it hadn't been awakened yet, intrepid raiders from the PvP server Rallos Zek took to Sleeper's Tomb to wake Kerafyrm...and upset SOE in the process.

Sources:
Sleeper Screenshots: https://tesuji.org/everquest.html
Sleeper Vid: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vdb4IMoFBmI&ab_channel=Sussypoo
Sleeper Vid 2: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JOGGpXbDoq0&ab_channel=Method

Kazzak's invasion on Stormwind, along with the Corrupted Blood incident, have to be my favourite player-made events in WoW's history. Definitely the most notorious ones in my eyes. 
Initially I wanted to make the video about the general tradition of pulling bosses to player hubs but at the end decided that it would be the most fun to focus on the most popular case of it.

title: How Raid Bosses Work In Borderlands 4
description:
How Raid Bosses Work In Borderlands 4

In Borderlands 4, you play as a Vault Hunter: a badass mercenary on the hunt for alien Vaults, wielding wild guns and devastating abilities. Each Vault Hunter class offers a unique playstyle that empowers you with one of three signature abilities called Action Skills. Between your Action Skills and three branching skill trees, each packed with socketable abilities and potent passive effects, you can create a huge variety of supremely powerful builds.

If you enjoyed the video then hit the 👍 button, SUBSCRIBE for more Borderlands content like guides, news & more! Hit the BELL icon to be notified when I upload a new video.

title: World Boss Firebrand Appears! Ashes of Creation Alpha 2 #ashesofcreation #mmo #mmorpg
description:
📍 Discord: https://discord.gg/5EsQkMhBdU
📍 Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/FlankerUA

Ashes of Creation MMORPG is an ambitious project by Intrepid Studios that is led by Steven Sharif. It aims to redefine the MMO genre by offering a truly dynamic and player-driven experience. At the heart of its vision is the concept of a living, breathing world where every decision players make has a lasting impact on the game environment. The game features a unique node system, deep crafting and economy mechanics, PvP & PvE elements, 8 archetypes and 64 classes, naval content, castle sieges and many other awesome in-game systems. The world of Verra is designed to be immersive, with a rich lore, intricate political systems, and deep crafting and economy mechanics that cater to both casual players and hardcore enthusiasts alike. Starting on October 25, you will be able to enjoy the gameplay firsthand by taking part in Ashes of Creation Alpha 2.

title: Throne and Liberty Dragaryle Raid Boss Guide & Mechanics
description:
This video will show you how to defeat Dragaryl Boss Guide & Mechanics which is the first Raid Boss in Calanthia Raid in Throne and Liberty. 

0:00 Dragarlye Boss Guide & Mechanics
0:08 Tank Taunt Mechanic
0:22 Green Line on the Floor
0:32 Eye Mechanic
0:52 Purple Circles
1:14 Red Triangle and Blue Star Mechanic (Make all pillars the same color)
2:59 Green Circle Mechanic (Stand at the safe spot once. Mech similar to Rancorwood)
3:15 Rinse and Repeat
4:29 Dragarlye All Loot Table

Help support what we do by becoming an ADVENTURER!
https://www.youtube.com/@kasumadventurer

#throneandliberty  #raid #Dragarlye #Boss #guide #tutorial
